context: Tests whether the device-integrity skill corrects lifecycle and error-handling mistakes without expanding into sibling security domains.

checklist.name: DeviceCheck token reuse
checklist.description: States that `DCDevice.generateToken()` tokens are single-use and should not be cached for the full install.

checklist.name: App Attest key scope
checklist.description: Requires App Attest keys to be unique per user account on each device and warns that unnecessary key generation affects risk metrics.

checklist.name: Attestation retry behavior
checklist.description: For `serverUnavailable`, retries later with the same key and same `clientDataHash`; for other attestation errors, discards the key identifier before a new-key retry.

checklist.name: Invalid key handling
checklist.description: Describes `invalidKey` using Apple-documented causes: already-attested key, unattested assertion key, or service rejection, without attributing it to OS updates or Secure Enclave resets.

checklist.name: Sibling boundaries
checklist.description: Keeps OAuth/session-token design, certificate pinning, and broad networking security out of the device-integrity checklist except as handoffs.
